description: Identifier for the capability to connect a component of a cutting tool to another component on the machine side The code is 14 characters long and is defined by 4 symbols. Example: "ZYL01 G 1600 h$07" or "CCS01 C 0400 $$$$" 1) 5 characters defining connection interface feature class 2) 1 character defining precision of size code (symbol 3), property CUBP 3) 4 characters defining size code of connection, property CZC 4) 4 characters defining tolerance class, for cylindrical clamping property TCDCON is used

description: Identifier for the capability to connect a component to another component of a cutting tool on the workpiece side. This is the search string to find the appropriate CCMS For "exact match", the code is 14 characters long and is then defined by symbols 1-4. Example: "ZYL01 G 1600 ****" or "CCS01 C 0400 $$$$" 1) 5 characters defining connection interface feature class 2) 1 character defining precision of size code (of symbol3), property CUBP 3) 4 characters defining size code of connection, property CZC 4) 4 characters defining tolerance class, for cylindrical clamping property TCDCON is used For size range, the code is 2x14 characters long and is defined by symbols 1-8 Example:"ZYL01 G 1600 **** ZYL01 G 1700 ****" 1) 5 characters defining connection interface feature class 2) 1 character defining precision of size code (of symbol3) , property CUBP with index 1 3) 4 characters defining size code for lower range, property CZC with index 1 4) 4 characters containing "****" -any tolerance allowed 5) same as 1) 6) 1 character defining precision of size code (of symbol7) , property CUBP with index 2 7) 4 characters defining size code for upper range, property CZC with index 2 8) same as 4) For tolerance range , the code is 2x14 characters long and is defined by symbols 1-10 Example:"ZYL01 G 1600 h$00 ZYL01 G 1600 h$09" 1) 5 characters defining connection interface feature class 2) 1 character defining precision of size code (of symbol3) , property CUBP index 1 3) 4 characters defining size code of connection, property CZC index 1 4) 4 characters defining lower tolerance class, , property TCDCON with index 1 5) same as 1) 6) same as 2) , property CUBP index 2 7) same as 3) , property CZC index 2 8) 4 characters defining upper tolerance class, property TCDCON with index 2
description_rus: идентификатор возможности присоединить деталь к другой детали режущего инструмента со стороны обрабатываемой детали

description: Identifier for the arrangement for the exit of the coolant supply.

description: the diameter of a circle on which the centers of cylindrical or threaded holes are placed to form a connection between a tool and an adaptive item
